sections.title: Candidate Hypotheses
sections.content:

- [engine-derived] StateCorruptionCandidate — State corruption candidate for 'owner'
- [engine-derived] ReentrancyCandidate — Reentrancy candidate in 'withdraw'

limitations: Source triage uses conservative text heuristics. No AST parsing, no compilation, no execution.
Fuzz maturity scan not requested (pass --include-fuzz-maturity to enable)
Surface mapping uses deterministic engine (parser/IR/graph) as primary source, with conservative text heuristics as fallback. No compilation, no runtime analysis, no execution.
